name: Counterfactual Reasoning for Causal Responsibility Attribution in Probabilistic Multi-Agent Systems

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库

digest_notes: This work models multi-agent systems as concurrent stochastic multi-player games and introduces retrospective counterfactual responsibility quantifying agent accountability for outcomes. It uses Shapley value to allocate responsibility among agents, satisfying fairness and consistency properties. The framework supports verification and strategic reasoning in responsibility-aware multi-agent systems, computing stable strategy profiles where agents trade off responsibility against expected reward
